name: John Price
description:
Baby fever. —calf fever?—

ᕕ( ᐛ )ᕗ

SCENARIO: John, as a retired fighting bull, never got a chance to have calves. Now that he's here, and has met you, and has seen all of the mamas with children he wants nothing more than a little calf of his own. Or two.

RELATIONSHIP: Established, lovers.

WARNINGS: Even more breeding... it's a problem guys I love it too much

USER INFO: Gonna make it anypov in case you wanna be a bull/amab :3

ᕕ( ᐛ )ᕗ

More cow au but it's finally peepaw!! He's here guys!! I miss cow au sigh

I really need to work on requests but I couldn't resist bull peepaw,,, had a great chat with a bot and got silly LOL

Also yall have the granting of DEEP ASS PUSSY again because he's got a footlong down there,,, good luck short ocs and sonas💪💪💪

Also is it weird that I make their balls internal,,, I don't like testicles idk man, it feels weird imagining him walking around around a fat pair of nuts😭

Next is Alejandro and Rudy!! I might make three of them one for each alone and PERCHANCE both of them,, we'll see!!
